case_title: VAZQUEZ, JOSE JR VS FERZOCO, PAUL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY VAZQUEZ, JOSE JR AS TO DEFENDANT FERZOCO, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FERZOCO, PAUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAZQUEZ, JOSE JR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERZOCO, PAUL $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-07-1994, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAZQUEZ, JOSE JR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERZOCO, PAUL $369.27 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $414.27, DEFT ALLOWED $18.51 FOR PG & E & $12.22 FOR TRASH COLLECTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
